description: Starter / placeholder perf baseline. These are deliberately *loose* sentinel values intended to let BaselineComparator.compare() run without falsely flagging every observation as a regression. They are NOT measured on a known-good build — replace them with real captured values (e.g. via `BaselineComparator` after a green run) before relying on this file in CI. With tolerance=1.5 (the default), each value below sets an effective ceiling at value × 1.5; observations beyond that ceiling are flagged as regressions.
